query: List movies directed by Christopher Nolan ordered by rating.

query: Find the average IMDb rating of movies released after 2010 by genre.
generated_sql: SELECT T3.genre, AVG(T1.imdb_rating) FROM Movie AS T1 JOIN Movie_Genre AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id JOIN Genre AS T3 ON T2.genre_id = T3.genre_id WHERE T1.year > 2010 GROUP BY T3.genre
